session.user: Run `ruff check packages/erk-mcp/ && ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff checks on the packages/erk-mcp/ directory and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/ && uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/
Run ruff linting and format checks on packages/erk-mcp/

session.tool_result: All checks passed! 5 files already formatted
session.assistant:
Success: ruff passed all checks on packages/erk-mcp/
**Summary:** - Linting: All checks passed - Formatting: 5 files already properly formatted
No issues found in the codebase.
